violations.text: Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of cardboard boxes and litter. Area to be maintained cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Cases of water were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
Reach-in Freezer was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, parts are on order to repair equipment. Unit was out of service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the chip shelves have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

1. Recycling disposal units were observed with missing lids, drain plug observed missing. Units to be properly adjusted. 2. Area was observed with an accumulation of excess pallets, totes, trash and debris. Area to be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
